content: NCL distinctive hull artwork per ship (used for CONFIRMED verification when no name lettering visible): Norwegian Pearl gems spiral, Norwegian Gem gem-clusters, Norwegian Sky NCL hibiscus/sunset, Norwegian Sun sunburst, Norwegian Escape Guy Harvey marlin/dolphin, Norwegian Encore Eduardo Arranz-Bravo abstract multi-color, Norwegian Bliss Robert Wyland orca, Norwegian Aqua Reef abstract, Norwegian Spirit colorful Spirit-specific abstract. Each is unique to that ship — a distinctive-livery match confirms identity even without name lettering.
